competitors.name: CAST Imaging
competitors.keyDifference: Broad enterprise platform (150+ languages) at high cost; lacks AI-augmented semantic analysis and structured 8-phase workflow
competitors.notes: Available on Azure Marketplace. Pricing based on LOC tiers. Optional extensions add 10-20%.

competitors.name: Micro Focus Enterprise Analyzer
competitors.keyDifference: Heavyweight enterprise product without AI augmentation; requires significant infrastructure vs SystemAnalyzer's lightweight local approach
competitors.notes: Handles millions of LOC. Interactive diagramming with forward/backward data flow analysis.

competitors.name: Micro Focus COBOL Analyzer
competitors.keyDifference: Traditional static analysis without AI; lacks modern web-based GoJS/Mermaid visualizations
competitors.notes: COBOL-specific with cyclomatic complexity metrics and dependency mapping.

competitors.name: IBM watsonx Code Assistant for Z
competitors.keyDifference: Cloud-dependent and migration-focused; SystemAnalyzer runs locally with Ollama and focuses on analysis/documentation
competitors.notes: Supports code understanding, refactoring, and migration to cloud-native architectures.

competitors.name: CloudFrame Atlas
competitors.keyDifference: Migration-readiness focused (paired with COBOL-to-Java converter); SystemAnalyzer is analysis-only with interactive visualizations
competitors.notes: Knowledge graph generation with combined deterministic + generative AI. Claims 8-12x faster than manual approaches.

competitors.name: Raincode Insight
competitors.keyDifference: Migration-strategy tool without AI augmentation or interactive web visualizations
competitors.notes: Supports COBOL, ADA, C. Paired with Raincode Checker for coding standards enforcement.
